title: Equipable Lanterns
description: Adds a lantern that can be equipped in a curios slot.
body:
Adds two equipable lanterns which are both equipped in a curios belt slot:
- Belt Lantern
- Belt Soul Lantern

Requires Curios API and Radiant Gear to work. Additionally you need to have a dynamic lights mod installed and edit its config to recognize this mod.

I use [Dynamic Lights by atomicstrykergrumpy](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dynamic-lights) and edit the dynamiclights_selflight.cfg file in the configs so it looks like this:
![dynamiclights_selflight.cfg](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e4389373ec7ec21886d6595ec636fcfd48a7124a.png)

If you have any suggestions just let me know!

Feel free to use this mod in any mod packs, just make sure to credit me.
